description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers with a modern, streamlined silhouette and a dark, nearly monochromatic color scheme. The shoes feature a textured, ribbed sole that appears thick and cushioned, likely designed for comfort and grip. The upper is constructed from a woven or knit material, giving it a subtle pattern and a flexible, breathable appearance. The shoes have a standard lace-up closure with round laces and reinforced eyelets, and a small pull tab is visible at the heel for easy wearing. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible branding or decorative elements, emphasizing function and urban style. The shoes are in excellent condition, showing no signs of wear or dirt.
description: A pair of dark, modern athletic sneakers with a ribbed sole, knit upper, and standard laces. The design is minimalistic and in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of both shoes, highlighting the ribbed sole, knit upper, and lace-up closure.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded toe box, lacing system, and the symmetrical shape of the shoes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the outer profile, ribbed sole, and heel pull tab.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel area, pull tabs, and the back curvature of the sole.
